LAW AND MOTION 302, "IN RESPONSE TO THE COVID-19 OUTBREAK, THE HEARING DATES FOR ALL LAW AND MOTION AND DISCOVERY MATTERS CURRENTLY CALENDARED IN DEPARTMENTS 301/302 ARE HEREBY VACATED. WHEN THE COURT RESUMES NORMAL OPERATIONS, THE PRESIDING JUDGE WILL ANNOUNCE PROCEDURES FOR SETTING HEARING DATES FOR THOSE CASES WHICH HAVE BEEN FULLY BRIEFED. OPPOSITIONS WILL BE DUE BASED ON THE RESCHEDULED HEARING DATE, BUT NOTHING PRECLUDES A PARTY FROM FILING AN OPPOSITION EARLIER." (302)

Final Approval Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-10-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom videoconference):
Robert Ottiger, Esq. for Plaintiff.
Kyle Nordrehaug, Esq. for PLaintiff.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)
The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Final Approval Hearing.

Plaintiffs' motion for final approval of class action settlement is granted. Of 414 class members, eight notices were undeliverable; no class member opted out or objected. Plaintiffs' counsel shall submit proposed order.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details) Final Accounting Hearing - 10/9/20.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR# 6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Dec-20-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Andre Mailhot, Esq. 415-325-2088 of the Ottinger Firm for Plaintiff through Court Call.
Aaron Colby, Esq. 213-633-6800 of Davis Wright Tremaine LLP for Defendant Joe & the Juice LA through Court Call.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. The Court shares its views. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF CHRISTIAN SIMMONS, ALAIN DE VILLIERS, DAVID NGUYEN's Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement.

Aproved. Final Approval Hearing on 4/17/20 at 9:30 am. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Dec-20-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Oct-09-2019 Continued To Dec-20-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Kyle Nordrehaug, Esq. of Blumenthal Nordrehaug & Bhowmik, T:858.551.1223 ext.1002, for plaintiff/moving party, by Court Call;
Robert Ottinger, Esq. of the Ottinger Firm, T:917.566.2037, for plaintiff/moving party.

RULING: Hearing was held as required by the tentative ruling. The matter was discussed. The Court found the terms of the settlement to be fair. The Court signed a joint stipulation granting leave for plaintiff to file a second amended consolidated class action complaint and set the hearing for preliminary approval of class action settlement for December 20, 2019. The Court also signed a stipualtion to consolidate cases. Therefore,

PLAINTIFF CHRISTIAN SIMMONS' Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement is continued to be heard on November 27, 2019 at 9:30am in Dept. 302.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com
